fields.name: Bank Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the bank account that has been reconciled with this Bank Account Statement.

fields.name: Statement No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the bank's statement that has been reconciled with the bank account.

fields.name: Statement Ending Balance
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending balance on the bank's statement that has been reconciled with the bank account.

fields.name: Statement Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on the bank's statement that has been reconciled with the bank account.

fields.name: Balance Last Statement
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending balance on the bank account statement from the last posted bank account reconciliation.

fields.name: Bank Account Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the bank account that has been reconciled.
